use_cases: Browse through collections with swipeable card navigation in stacked view
Switch between stack, grid, and list layouts for different content densities
Expand cards to reveal detailed information without page navigation
Display product or feature showcases with interactive card interactions
Create responsive card-based galleries and dashboards with fluid transitions
ai_summary: A morphing card stack component featuring smooth layout transitions between stack, grid, and list views, with drag/swipe navigation and expandable card details. Built with Framer Motion for fluid animations and supports multiple visual density modes for different browsing preferences.
